Two types of users: salon clients who book and salon owners who manage schedules.

The app needs appointment booking, calendar management, notifications, and payments.

A social platform where local artists can share their work and get commissions from buyers.
End consumers — young creatives aged 18-35 who use their phone daily for social apps.
After using the app artists feel validated and earn income from their passion projects.
Three roles: the artist who posts, the buyer who commissions, and the admin who moderates.
Mostly mobile since artists post photos and buyers browse on Instagram-like feeds.
